args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, FirstName, LastName FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(Id, '#', '') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, FirstName, LastName FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(Id, '#', '') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 10;

args.query:
SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, oi.Quantity, p.Name as ProductName, p.Id as ProductId
FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
JOIN Product2 p ON REPLACE(p.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oi.Product2Id,'#','')
WHERE REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, oi.Quantity, p.Name as ProductName, p.Id as ProductId
FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
JOIN Product2 p ON REPLACE(p.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oi.Product2Id,'#','')
WHERE REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30';
